x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Virtual Agent is the primary delivery channel for Now Assist conversational AI. Without glide.cs.enabled=true, VA topics and Now Assist prompts cannot be surfaced to end users.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Set glide.cs.enabled=true in sys_properties. Confirm the Virtual Agent plugin is active. Both must be true before Now Assist conversational AI topics can be surfaced to end users.
